nasb.text: She took it up and went into the city, and her mother-in-law saw what she had gleaned. She also took it out and gave Naomi what she had left after she was satisfied.

esv.text: And she took it up and went into the city. Her mother-in-law saw what she had gleaned. She also brought out and gave her what food she had left over after being satisfied.

cnv.text: 然後帶回城裡去。路得把撿來的麥子拿給婆婆看，把吃剩的給了婆婆。

ccb.text: 她把捡来的麦子带回城里给婆婆拿俄米看，又把剩下来的食物给婆婆。

csbs.text: 然后她带进城去给婆婆看她所捡拾的，又把她饱足后多余的拿出来给了婆婆。
